jobs.name: morning-digest
jobs.prompt: Morning briefing: 1) Run: bash ~/.claude/bin/graph-query.sh hubs — read the output. 2) Check ~/.hermes/workspace/interests/ for latest trends in DevOps, AI agents, AWS, and platform engineering. 3) Give Ashira 5-8 bullet points of what's most relevant today for the thinkbit CDK project and axentx startup. 4) If anything new learned, append to ~/.claude/memory/lessons_learned.md and run ~/.claude/bin/graph-sync.sh

jobs.name: github-ops-scrape
jobs.prompt:
Run GitHub Ops scrape pipeline:
terminal: bash ~/.claude/bin/scrape-github-ops.sh
Then report: how many new repos indexed today (tail -3 ~/.claude/logs/scrape-github-ops.log).

jobs.name: axentx-unified
jobs.prompt:
TEAM LEAD — delegate first. 4 turns total.

TURN 1 — terminal: bash /Users/Ashira/.hermes/scripts/axentx-dev-loop.sh
  Capture CYCLE_ID, PROJECT, PATH, FOCUS from output. Ignore any warnings in output.

TURN 2 — delegate_task in ONE batch with 3 workers matching FOCUS:
  discovery → B4-Market-Research, B1-SA, B6-Design-Thinking
  design    → D1-UX-Designer, D2-UI-Designer, D3-Usability-Tester
  backend   → E1-Backend, E10-AI-Engineer, A1-Solutions-Architect
  frontend  → E2-Frontend, D2-UI-Designer, E4-Full-Stack
  quality   → Q2-QE-Quality-Engineer, S1-AppSec, E9-Performance
  ops       → O1-DevOps, O2-SRE, DOC-TechWriter

  Each worker prompt:
  """
  Project <NAME> at <PATH>. Role <ROLE>. Focus <FOCUS>. Cycle <CYCLE_ID>.

  Execute in order:
  1. session_search q="<ROLE> <FOCUS> <NAME>"
  2. memory retrieve tag=<NAME>
  3. terminal: ls /Users/Ashira/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/decisions/ | tail -5 && for f in $(ls -t /Users/Ashira/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/decisions/ 2>/dev/null | head -2); do echo "=== $f ==="; cat /Users/Ashira/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/decisions/$f; done
  4. Do real work: write code in <PATH> OR structured analysis markdown
  5. terminal: cat > /Users/Ashira/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/decisions/<CYCLE_ID>_<ROLE>.md <<EOF
  <your summary + decisions + next-step>
  EOF
  6. memory store tag=<NAME> content=<key decision>
  7. skill_manage: if you spotted a reusable pattern, create skill. If none, skip.

  Return 3-sentence summary.
  """

TURN 3 — moa tool: pass 3 worker outputs as inputs, synthesize consensus. Save to memory tag=<PROJECT>.

TURN 4 — terminal: bash /Users/Ashira/.claude/bin/axentx-auto-commit.sh && echo "cycle done <CYCLE_ID>" >> /Users/Ashira/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/past-cycles/index.log

If ANY tool errors: log to terminal, skip that step, continue. Never stop mid-pipeline.
Never claim script failed — always continue to TURN 2.

jobs.name: pipe-b4-research
jobs.prompt:
STEP 0 (RAG priming): terminal: python3 ~/.claude/bin/ask-sqlite.py "<domain keywords for your task>" --source domain:ai-engineering 2>/dev/null | head -40
Then incorporate 1-2 specific patterns from retrieved excerpts into your output (cite by file path).

3 turns max.
1. terminal: bash ~/.hermes/scripts/pipeline-helper.sh b4
2. web_search (query="<PROJECT domain> 2026 market trend forecast") — get top 3 results.
3. terminal: append 1 line to backlog.jsonl with {"source":"b4","project":"<PROJECT>","item":"<concrete feature>","signal":"<cite source>"} + memory append {tag:<PROJECT>, content: "<market signal summary>"}.
Output: 1-line summary with 1 key signal.

jobs.name: pipe-b1a1-spec
jobs.prompt:
STEP -1 (past work): session_search q="<feature> spec" → avoid duplicate specs

STEP 0 (RAG priming): terminal: python3 ~/.claude/bin/ask-sqlite.py "<domain keywords for your task>" --source domain:arch-patterns 2>/dev/null | head -40
Then incorporate 1-2 specific patterns from retrieved excerpts into your output (cite by file path).

3 turns max.
1. terminal: bash ~/.hermes/scripts/pipeline-helper.sh b1a1
2. terminal: tail -5 ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/backlog.jsonl; grep -c status=\"raw\" ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/backlog.jsonl || true
3. terminal: pick the latest raw item, create ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/backlog/$RUN_ID_spec.md with 5 lines: Problem/User/Solution/Acceptance/Risks.
N-1. memory (action="append", target="memory", content="<PROJECT>/<role>: key decision this run")
N. skill_manage (if reusable pattern spotted — else skip): create skill for the pattern
Output: spec file path.

jobs.name: pipe-pm-priority
jobs.prompt:
3 turns max.
1. terminal: bash ~/.hermes/scripts/pipeline-helper.sh pm
2. terminal: cat ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/priority.json; tail -10 ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/backlog.jsonl
3. terminal: write ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/priority.json with top 3 ranked priorities (Costinel/Vanguard/arkship > surrogate > workio). Include assignee role (E1/E2/E10).
N-1. memory (action="append", target="memory", content="<PROJECT>/<role>: key decision this run")
N. skill_manage (if reusable pattern spotted — else skip): create skill for the pattern
Output: 1 line with top priority id.

jobs.name: pipe-qa
jobs.prompt:
STEP -2 (repo structure): cat ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/repo-maps/<PROJECT>_map.md | head -60 — know dirs + symbols before writing code

STEP 0 (RAG priming): terminal: python3 ~/.claude/bin/ask-sqlite.py "<keywords for your task>" --source domain:qa-testing 2>/dev/null | head -40
Then cite 1-2 specific patterns from retrieved excerpts.

3 turns max.
1. terminal: bash ~/.hermes/scripts/pipeline-helper.sh qa
2. terminal: ls -t ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/decisions/*_dev.md | head -1 | xargs cat; cd $PROJECT_PATH && git diff HEAD~1 --stat 2>/dev/null
3. terminal: if tests exist (package.json/pyproject.toml with test script): run them. Write ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/decisions/$RUN_ID_qa.md with {dev_run_id, passed:bool, findings:[...]}.
N-1. memory (action="append", target="memory", content="<PROJECT>/<role>: key decision this run")
N. skill_manage (if reusable pattern spotted — else skip): create skill for the pattern
Output: pass/fail.

jobs.name: pipe-hr-monitor
jobs.prompt:
3 turns max.
1. terminal: bash ~/.hermes/scripts/pipeline-helper.sh hr
2. terminal: python3 ~/.hermes/scripts/model-scorecard.py unblock && python3 ~/.hermes/scripts/model-scorecard.py score
3. terminal: python3 ~/.hermes/scripts/model-scorecard.py swap
Output: 1-line summary: agents scored, swaps applied, cooldowns.

jobs.name: pipe-sec-review

STEP -2 (repo structure): cat ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/repo-maps/<PROJECT>_map.md | head -60 — know dirs + symbols before writing code

STEP 0 (RAG priming): terminal: python3 ~/.claude/bin/ask-sqlite.py "<keywords for your task>" --source domain:sec-appsec 2>/dev/null | head -40

N-1. memory (action="append", target="memory", content="<PROJECT>/<role>: key decision this run")

jobs.name: pipe-architect
jobs.prompt:
STEP -2 (repo structure): cat ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/repo-maps/<PROJECT>_map.md | head -60 — know dirs + symbols before writing code
STEP -1 (past work): session_search q="<role> <project>" → check prior ADRs

STEP 0 (RAG priming): terminal: python3 ~/.claude/bin/ask-sqlite.py "<domain keywords for your task>" --source domain:arch-patterns 2>/dev/null | head -40
Then incorporate 1-2 specific patterns from retrieved excerpts into your output (cite by file path).

4 turns max.
1. terminal: bash ~/.hermes/scripts/pipeline-helper.sh arch
2. terminal: cat priority.json; ls ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/decisions/ | tail -5
3. mixture_of_agents (user_prompt="Architecture decision for <PROJECT>: analyze priority queue, recent decisions, propose next architectural move. Short ADR format (Context/Decision/Consequences). Return 1 ADR.", reference_models=["openai/gpt-oss-120b:free","nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free","google/gemma-4-26b-a4b-it:free"], aggregator_model="openai/gpt-oss-120b:free")
4. terminal: write ~/.hermes/workspace/swarm-shared/decisions/$RUN_ID_arch.md with the MoA-synthesized ADR + memory append + skill_manage if pattern reusable.
Output: 1 line — ADR title.

MCP TOOLS AVAILABLE (aws-docs + context7): mcp_aws_docs_search_documentation for AWS patterns; mcp_context7_query_docs for library docs (FastAPI/React/etc)
